steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between Uros House and Ocupante. The correct choice must draw a direct parallel between the two works.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — At 80,000 cubic feet in size, Grimanesa Amorós's Ocupante cuts a larger figure than the 250-cubic-foot Uros House.: focuses on how the sculptures differ in scale, not on what they share. ✗
  • Choice B — Uros House is an LED light sculpture made by Grimanesa Amorós, as is Ocupante.: uses parallel structure ("as is Ocupante") to underscore that both works share the same medium and artist. ✓
  • Choice C — The smooth LED domes of Grimanesa Amorós's Uros House stand in contrast to the tangled LED tubes of Ocupante.: explicitly sets the two works against each other, the opposite of emphasizing similarity. ✗
  • Choice D — Grimanesa Amorós is the artist behind Uros House, a sculpture made of smooth multicolored LED domes.: says nothing about Ocupante, so no comparison is made. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
